title: Server-side configuration
description:
The server directory is responsible for managing the server-level configuration of the Hadoop MapReduce architecture. It contains two subdirectories, jobtracker and tasktracker, which handle the server-level configuration for the JobTracker and TaskTracker components, respectively. The server directory does not contain any core logic, inputs/outputs, or dependencies. Instead, it provides a centralized location for storing and managing the server-level configuration for the entire Hadoop MapReduce system.

--- DIRECTORY: server/jobtracker ---
TITLE: Server-side JobTracker configuration
DESCRIPTION: The JTConfig class is a placeholder for MapReduce server-level configuration. It defines constants for the shuffle index cache size, maximum number of map tasks that can run on the task tracker, and the resource calculator plugin to be used by the task tracker.

--- DIRECTORY: server/tasktracker ---
TITLE: Server-side TaskTracker configuration
DESCRIPTION: The TTConfig class is a placeholder for MapReduce server-level configuration. It defines constants for the shuffle index cache size, maximum number of map tasks that can run on the task tracker, and the resource calculator plugin to be used by the task tracker.
